channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran: Israel Must Withdraw Troops from Lebanon Under U.S. Deal
item.description: Iran's foreign minister stated that Israeli troops cannot remain in Lebanon under the pending agreement with the U.S.

item.title: Iran and Israel express reservations about deal before expected signing
item.description: Senior U.S. officials report that President Trump and Iran's lead negotiator have already signed a memorandum of understanding remotely, ahead of a planned ceremony.

item.title: Mitch McConnell hospitalized, spokesperson confirms
item.description: Senator Mitch McConnell was admitted to the hospital on Sunday morning, according to a spokesperson for the Republican.

item.title: Markets watch Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's initial interest rate decisions
item.description: Since his nomination by President Trump in late January, questions have persisted about whether Kevin Warsh will push for interest rate increases.
